languages.text: "Эти железные твари пришли как будто из ниоткуда. Атакуют волнами, передышки почти не дают. Хорошо, что мы успели отправить сообщение. Эти чудища не из плоти, не ведают страха, и теснят нас по всем фронтам. Так что ваше появление — благословение самого Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "Эти железные твари пришли как будто из ниоткуда. Атакуют волнами, передышки почти не дают. Хорошо, что мы успели отправить сообщение. Эти чудища не из плоти, не ведают страха, и теснят нас по всем фронтам. Так что ваше появление — благословение самого Бога-Императора".
traits.speaker: JanurZarkovSergeant

languages.text: "These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."
languages.original_text: "Эти железные твари пришли как будто из ниоткуда. Атакуют волнами, передышки почти не дают. Хорошо, что мы успели отправить сообщение. Эти чудища не из плоти, не ведают страха, и теснят нас по всем фронтам. Так что ваше появление — благословение самого Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "I don't know, Lord Captain. These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any respite. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

"I don't know, Lord Captain. These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

"I don't know, Lord Captain. These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

languages.text: 「知りません、艦長。まるで空から現れたかのように。波のように襲いかかってくるのです。わずかな休む間も与えてくれません。幸い、間に合って連絡ができたのです。この敵は肉体ではなく、恐怖を知りません。あらゆる方向から迫ってきます。ですから、貴方の到着は、皇帝陛下ご自身の御加護です」
languages.original_text: "I don't know, Lord Captain. It's as if they came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any respite. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

traits.locale_text: 「わかりません、艦長。まるで空から現れたかのように。波のように襲いかかってくるのです。わずかな休む間も与えてくれません。幸い、間に合って連絡ができたのです。この敵は肉体ではなく、恐怖を知りません。あらゆる方向から迫ってきます。ですから、貴方の到着は、皇帝陛下ご自身の御加護です。」

languages.text: «Estas criaturas metálicas salen de la nada. Atacan en oleadas y apenas nos dan un respiro. Menos mal que pudimos enviar el mensaje a tiempo. Estas cosas no están hechas de carne, no conocen el miedo y nos atacan en todos los frentes. Su llegada es una bendición del propio Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

traits.locale_text: «Estas criaturas metálicas salen de la nada. Atacan en oleadas y apenas nos dan un respiro. Menos mal que pudimos enviar el mensaje a tiempo. Estas cosas no están hechas de carne, no conocen el miedo y nos atacan en todos los frentes. Su llegada es una bendición del propio Dios Emperador».

languages.text: "Diese Eisenkreaturen kamen aus dem Nichts. Sie greifen in Wellen an, gönnen uns keine Pause. Nur gut, dass wir rechtzeitig eine Nachricht senden konnten. Diese Dinger bestehen nicht aus Fleisch und kennen keine Angst ... und sie rücken an allen Fronten vor. Eure Ankunft ist also ein Segen des Gottimperators Selbst."
languages.original_text: "These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Eisenkreaturen kamen aus dem Nichts. Sie greifen in Wellen an, gönnen uns keine Pause. Nur gut, dass wir rechtzeitig eine Nachricht senden konnten. Diese Dinger bestehen nicht aus Fleisch und kennen keine Angst ... und sie rücken an allen Fronten vor. Eure Ankunft ist also ein Segen des Gottimperators Selbst."

languages.text: « Ces créatures métalliques ont surgi de nulle part. Elles nous attaquent par vagues, en ne nous laissant pratiquement aucun répit. Nous avons eu de la chance de parvenir à envoyer un message avant qu'il ne soit trop tard. Ces êtres dépourvus de chair ne connaissent pas la peur et nous harcèlent sur tous les fronts. Votre arrivée est une bénédiction de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui-même. »
languages.original_text: "These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

traits.locale_text: « Ces créatures métalliques ont surgi de nulle part. Elles nous attaquent par vagues, en ne nous laissant pratiquement aucun répit. Nous avons eu de la chance de parvenir à envoyer un message avant qu'il ne soit trop tard. Ces êtres dépourvus de chair ne connaissent pas la peur et nous harcèlent sur tous les fronts. Votre arrivée est une bénédiction de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui-même. »

languages.text: “这些铁皮生物就像凭空出现的一样，一波接一波地发动进攻，几乎不给我们任何喘息的机会。幸好我们及时发出了求援信号。这些怪物没有血肉，不知恐惧，正从各个方向逼近我们。您的到来对我们来说简直就是神皇亲赐的恩典。”
languages.original_text: "These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

traits.locale_text: “这些铁皮生物就像凭空出现的一样，一波接一波地发动进攻，几乎不给我们任何喘息的机会。幸好我们及时发出了求援信号。这些怪物没有血肉，不知恐惧，正从各个方向逼近我们。您的到来对我们来说简直就是神皇亲赐的恩典。”

languages.text: "Şu demir yaratıklar sanki yoktan var oldu. Dalgalar hâlinde saldırıyorlar, bize hiç nefes aldırmıyorlar. Zamanında mesaj gönderebilmemiz iyi oldu. Bu şeyler etten yapılma değil, korku bilmiyorlar ve her taraftan üzerimize geliyorlar. Yani gelişiniz, bizzat Tanrı İmparator'dan bir lütuf oldu."
languages.original_text: "These iron creatures came out of thin air. They attack in waves, giving us hardly any break. It's a good thing we managed to get a message out in time. These things are not made of flesh and know no fear, and they're closing in on us on all fronts. So, your arrival is a blessing from the God-Emperor Himself."

Bu şeyler etten yapılma değil, korku bilmiyorlar ve her taraftan üzerimize geliyorlar. Yani gelişiniz, bizzat Tanrı İmparator'dan bir lütuf oldu."
